title: SWOT Analysis Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the SWOT Analysis skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

internal_performance_data.description: Internal performance data (financial results, operational KPIs, customer metrics)

organizational_capability_inventory.description: Organizational capability inventory (people, technology, processes, assets)

external_market_competitive.description: External market and competitive intelligence (industry trends, competitor profiles, regulatory landscape)

stakeholder_input_functional.description: Stakeholder input representing multiple functional perspectives (interviews, surveys, or workshop outputs)

prior_strategic_plans.description: Prior strategic plans and their performance against targets

benchmarking_data.description: Benchmarking data against industry peers or best-in-class operators
